_comment: Per-player AI patrol-zone rectangles, extracted verbatim from the original disk image's roster data (Player.cs _zoneXY1/_zoneXY2, RAM 0x4BB2 team1 / 0x4FB4 team2, via tools/extract_binary_constants.py). Not yet consumed by sim/ -- staged as the prerequisite data for porting REF's sub_D742_AII AI dispatch (see docs/spec/ai-gap-analysis.md), which also needs a DirBits-equivalent representation before it can use this. Roster index order matches data/teams.json's player order: 0 GK, 1-2 DEF, 3-5 MID, 6-7 WING, 8 CFWD. NOTE: Atari-sourced (REF's gameplay code has no Amiga-data path); this project's standing preference is Amiga-as-master when platforms disagree -- treat as provisional, not confirmed, until cross-checked. See docs/spec/ai-gap-analysis.md's 'Amiga vs. Atari master-version note'.
